name: Áskell API
description:
# Authentication
Authentication is via `Authorization` header. When using this documentation to test the API you should prepend your given api key with `"Api-Key "`. 

You are given two types of API keys, one public and one secret. Your public key is safe to use in javascript so that it is public to the world. It can only 
be used to generate a temporary payment method, which in turn has to be confirmed using your secret api key.

See [the documentation](https://docs.askell.is/) for more information.
